columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the policy event

columns.name: AlertDefinitionName
columns.description: Name of the alert definition associated with the policy event

columns.name: CreatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the policy event was created

columns.name: UpdatedAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the policy event was last updated

columns.name: PolicyAction
columns.description: Action taken by the policy (deliver, mark-spam, move, inbox, delete, none)

columns.name: PolicyEnabled
columns.description: Whether the policy that triggered this event is enabled

columns.name: NotifiedOriginalRecipients
columns.description: Whether the original email recipients were notified about this policy event

columns.name: AdminRecipients
columns.description: Array of admin email addresses notified about this policy event
